summary: [USB] Source switch from FM to USB takes more than 200ms (STR KPI failure)
description:
When user taps USB source button, the source-to-render time exceeds 200ms threshold. Observed 378ms delay during STR test.

Steps to reproduce:
1. Start FM radio playback
2. Connect USB device with media files
3. Tap USB source button
4. Measure time from button press to first audio frame

Expected: < 200ms
Actual: 378ms

SW Version: SW_2026.06.01_R1
HW Version: EVB_R2.1
Test Environment: Vehicle simulator
